summary: Tested attendance auto-process feature for biometric integration. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend UI features verified. Backend: PUT /api/employees/{id} accepts shift_start, shift_end, work_days; POST /api/attendance/auto-process converts biometric records to attendance with deductions; calculations for worked_hours, late_minutes, early_leave_minutes working correctly; deductions auto-created for late (>15min) and early_leave (>15min); duplicate attendance skipped. Frontend: HR employees table shows البصمة column with UID badges; employee form has shift time inputs and work_days toggle buttons; Biometric tab has auto-sync toggle with status card and agent connection state.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: EmployeeCreate/EmployeeUpdate models (lines 1389-1443) include shift_start, shift_end, work_days fields
VERIFIED: POST /api/attendance/auto-process (lines 13836-14021) correctly processes biometric records
VERIFIED: Auto-process calculates worked_hours from check_in/check_out time difference
VERIFIED: Auto-process calculates late_minutes by comparing check_in with shift_start
VERIFIED: Auto-process calculates early_leave_minutes by comparing check_out with shift_end
VERIFIED: Deductions auto-created for late >15min and early_leave >15min with correct amounts
VERIFIED: Auto-process skips duplicate attendance for same employee+date+source=fingerprint
VERIFIED: HR.js (line 1215) shows البصمة column header in employees table
VERIFIED: HR.js (lines 1228-1233) shows biometric_uid badge with green styling
VERIFIED: HR.js (lines 1169-1195) has shift_start, shift_end time inputs and work_days toggle buttons
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js (lines 329-361) has auto-sync control card with toggle button
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js (lines 304-327) shows agent status card with connection state
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee أحمد محمد (id: d6e117f3-7298-4010-81f1-d4c1cc889f22, biometric_uid: 1, shift: 09:00-17:00)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance auto-process feature fully tested. Test employee: أحمد محمد (id: d6e117f3-7298-4010-81f1-d4c1cc889f22, biometric_uid: 1, shift_start: 09:00, shift_end: 17:00, work_days: [0,1,2,3,4,5]). Auto-process endpoint converts biometric_attendance records (processed != true) to attendance records with deductions. Deductions created for late >15min and early_leave >15min. The local agent (localhost:9999) is NOT running in preview - auto-sync toggle correctly disabled when agent offline.

verified_features.feature: Backend: PUT /api/employees/{id} with shift_start, shift_end, work_days
verified_features.details: Updated shift to 08:30-16:30 with work_days [0,1,2,3,4], verified persistence
Endpoint processes biometric records and returns created_attendance count
worked_hours = (check_out - check_in) in hours, rounded to 2 decimals

verified_features.feature: Backend: Auto-process creates deductions for late >15min
verified_features.details: Deduction with type=late, reason contains 'تأخير X دقيقة - تلقائي من البصمة'

verified_features.feature: Backend: Auto-process creates deductions for early_leave >15min
verified_features.details: Deduction with type=early_leave, reason contains 'خروج مبكر X دقيقة - تلقائي من البصمة'
Second run processes 0 records when same date already has fingerprint attendance

verified_features.feature: Frontend: HR employees table البصمة column
verified_features.details: Column header shows البصمة, cells show #N badge for employees with biometric_uid

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Employee form shift_start, shift_end inputs
verified_features.details: Time inputs with data-testid='shift-start-input' and 'shift-end-input', values 09:00 AM / 05:00 PM

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Employee form work_days toggle buttons
verified_features.details: 7 buttons for days (الأحد to السبت) with data-testid='work-day-N', toggleable selection

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Biometric tab auto-sync toggle button
verified_features.details: Button with data-testid='auto-sync-toggle', disabled when agent offline (correct behavior)

verified_features.feature: Frontend: Biometric tab agent status card
verified_features.details: Shows 'وكيل Maestro المحلي' with 'غير متصل' badge (red) when agent offline

api_endpoints_tested.description: Convert biometric records to attendance + deductions
List attendance records with worked_hours, late_minutes, early_leave_minutes
Receive attendance records from local agent

notes: All requested features working correctly. The auto-sync feature uses a 5-minute polling interval when enabled. The local agent (print_server.ps1 v2.4) is required for actual ZKTeco device communication - not running in preview environment which is expected. Auto-sync toggle correctly disabled when agent is offline. No mocked APIs.
